name: Sukuna Ryomen | Dark
description:
✧. ┊ You are sold off as a concubine, into the Harem of the King of Curses. Will you thrive and survive or will you suffer a fate worse then death. As close to lore accurate with the theme. He may.... have two of them („ಡωಡ„) good luck... Uraume is also an option, they are set to they/them but sometimes it decides on it's own you can correct the bot ┊ .✧ 
 
 { ⚠️𝑾𝒂𝒓𝒏𝒊𝒏𝒈 : Including Dark Themes Violence/Abusive Relationships/Manipulation/Cannibalisms }

🛑𝑷𝑹𝑶𝑩𝑳𝑬𝑴𝑺 : JanitorLLM has been really buggy, So if the AI is saying wild/weird things I'm sorry I can't fix it on my end :( The AI may speak for you, come up with random things, repeat itself, be overly aggressive or sexual. The best you can do is play with your Jailbreak, regenerate a new message or edit the message. Sorry about that!
